topic: The Vanished Flannan Isles Lighthouse Keepers
context: Part 3 will reveal the artifact is an ancient ward or binding tool, broken and now releasing something malevolent. The 'dark figures' in the log entries were not human. The keepers stumbled upon an ancient seal, accidentally breaking it, releasing an entity that either consumed them or lured them away into another dimension/realm tied to the artifact. The entity's true form will be hinted at, tying into local folklore or deeper cosmic horror.
